title: Connecticut Association of Disability Examiners — Constitution
description: Constitution of the Connecticut Association of Disability Examiners, a unit that is simultaneously part of the Connecticut Rehabilitation Association (a chapter of the National Rehabilitation Association) and organized under the Constitution and By-Laws of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE), described as a division of the National Rehabilitation Association. Articles I-XII cover name, the layered affiliation, definitions, purpose, membership, meetings, election and nomination, officers (President/Vice-President/Secretary/Treasurer for one-year terms), committees, parliamentary authority (Modern Rules of Order), constitutional amendments, and the convention of delegates.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Connecticut Chapter
source.title: Constitution of the Connecticut Association of Disability Examiners

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'Connecticut-Const-Bylaws.docx' in the same directory; expect conversion artifacts (article headings run inline with their first section). The closing line states 'This document was dated stamped 02/27/75', so temporal_coverage start/end are set to 1975. Note: despite the source filename, the content is the Constitution only (no separately titled By-Laws section is present); it also frames NADE as a division of the National Rehabilitation Association, reflecting NADE's earlier organizational structure. The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link.
